name: aios
description: Your second brain for Claude Code — persistent memory, learned patterns, and skills that improve over time.

plugins.name: aios
plugins.description: Your second brain for Claude Code — persistent memory, learned patterns, and skills that improve over time.

skills.name: aios-init
skills.description: Bootstrap a new AI-OS in the current directory — conversational onboarding that scaffolds your brain, configures skills, and sets up the self-improvement loop.

skills.name: aios-update
skills.description: Non-destructive update of an installed AI-OS — pulls new skills, hooks, and templates from the upgraded plugin without touching brain data. diff/apply modes, per-conflict prompts, automatic rollback on failure.

skills.name: aios-explore
skills.description: Show every AI-OS skill available in this session, grouped by purpose, with one-line descriptions and when to use each. Use any time the user asks "what can this do" or at the end of /aios-init to orient a fresh install.

skills.name: forge-skill
skills.description: Auto-generate intent-wrapped skills from a connected MCP. User connects a new MCP (Gmail, Notion, Linear, etc.), runs /forge-skill <mcp-name>, and the brain proposes 3-5 skill candidates that wrap its tools with natural-language intents. Every skill is approved before it's written. How AI-OS grows capabilities as the user connects new tools.

skills.name: memory-search
skills.description: Search the AI-OS brain for relevant files, entities, and knowledge before starting work.

skills.name: decision-check
skills.description: Search prior decisions on a topic — prevents contradictions and surfaces relevant history.

skills.name: nightly-consolidation
skills.description: Nightly brain consolidation — processes short-term memory, extracts patterns, improves skills.

skills.name: reflect
skills.description: On-demand strategic reflection — goal-by-goal progress, patterns observed, course corrections. Use at checkpoints or when feeling scattered.

skills.name: foresight
skills.description: Forward-looking planning — 3-7 ranked priorities for the week or window ahead with explicit cost, progress signals, and one drop. Use when planning a new window or recovering from scatter.

skills.name: project-status
skills.description: Decision-grade status read on one project — cadence, state label (active/stalled/blocked/deprioritized/done/abandoned-quietly), next concrete action, and a continue/revive/close/hand-off/wait recommendation.

skills.name: signal-calibration
skills.description: Nightly calibration of the thalamus signal detector — compares predicted vs used brain regions across real transcripts, computes precision/recall per category, proposes concrete keyword changes with citations. observe/propose/apply modes; apply requires explicit confirmation.

skills.name: nightly-goal-pursuit
skills.description: Advance one long-term goal overnight — research, outreach prep, drafts, or list-building grounded in the brain. Writes a single morning-delivery file under memory/short-term/ with a headline, the first move to take when waking up, concrete outputs, and a gap log. Turns sleep into compounding.

skills.name: behavioral-learning
skills.description: Observe how the user actually works — not what they say — and extract behavioral patterns that feed back into skills, triggers, and defaults. Reads archived transcripts, the autonomous-runs ledger, and usage frequency. Writes inferred patterns to learning/behavioral-patterns.md. The difference between 'memory' and 'an assistant that learns you'.

skills.name: auto-outreach-queue
skills.description: Autonomously draft a queue of personalized follow-ups for people in knowledge/people/ who are overdue, have open commitments, or matter for an active goal. Voice-matched, grounded in prior interactions, queued for morning review. Nothing sent without the user's approval.

optionalSkills.name: relationship-check
optionalSkills.description: Quick, honest read on one relationship — last contact, freshness verdict, open commitments both ways, specific next action. Reads knowledge/people/ and cross-references decisions, projects, and optional Gmail/GCal/WhatsApp. No integration required.

optionalSkills.name: meeting-prep
optionalSkills.description: One-screen brief for an upcoming meeting — purpose, desired outcome, attendees with freshness, open threads, your asks + their likely asks, risk flags. Pulls from GCal, knowledge, decisions, and projects.

hooks.name: session-start
hooks.description: Creates a short-term memory file for the session and injects vital signs plus learned patterns into context.

hooks.name: session-end
hooks.description: Archives the session transcript into memory/short-term/transcripts/ so nightly consolidation can read it.

hooks.name: post-tool-failure
hooks.description: Logs tool or MCP failures to learning/tool-errors.log so the system can learn from them.

hooks.name: user-prompt-submit
hooks.description: Emits a lightweight THALAMUS routing hint based on keyword signals in the prompt.
